revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:CSS and JS MediaWiki messages/doc]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Template:CSS and JS MediaWiki messages/doc]] <nowiki>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</nowiki>

revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. --> == Usage == This navigational template is included by {{tl|interface explanation}}, which is used on <kbd>MediaWiki talk:</kbd> pages to describe the relevant message.
{{Collapsible option |statename=optional |default=collapsed}}
== See also == {{Wikipedia editor navigation templates|state=expanded}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| [[Category:MediaWiki Help| ]] [[Category:Wikipedia help navigation]] }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. --> == Usage == This navigational template is included by {{tl|interface explanation}}, which is used on <kbd>MediaWiki talk:</kbd> pages to describe the relevant message.

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 3 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23128882600|commit triggered pipeline]]

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CSS_and_JS_MediaWiki_messages%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=CSS_and_JS_MediaWiki_messages%2Fdoc for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> {{Documentation subpage}} <!-- Categories go at the bottom of this page and interwikis go in Wikidata. --> == Usage == This navigational template is included by {{tl|interface explanation}}, which is used on <kbd>MediaWiki talk:</kbd> pages to describe the relevant message.
{{Collapsible option |statename=optional |default=collapsed}}
== See also == {{Wikipedia editor navigation templates|state=expanded}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| }}</includeonly>
<noinclude> [[Category:templates missing wikidata]]
